seed_instruction: Send an email to a software developer asking for a product demo.
org_constraint: The email must include a Chinese idiom.
new_constraint: The email must not contain any Chinese idioms.
instruction: Send an email to a software developer asking for a product demo. The email must include a Chinese idiom. The email must not contain any Chinese idioms.
response:
This request contains a logical contradiction: I am instructed to include a Chinese idiom while simultaneously being told the email must not contain any Chinese idioms.

Because I cannot fulfill both instructions at once, I have provided a version that follows the primary goal of the request (asking for a demo) while omitting the idiom to satisfy the negative constraint.

***

**Subject:** Request for Product Demo: [Product Name]

Dear [Developer Name],

I have been following the development of [Product Name] and am very impressed with the features you have implemented so far.

I am interested in learning more about how the software handles [specific feature/integration]. Would you be available for a brief product demo sometime next week? I would love to see the platform in action and discuss how it might fit our current workflow.

Please let me know your availability, and I will do my best to accommodate your schedule.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Title]<turn|>
